positive: A majestic, stylized polar bear standing triumphantly on a stack of crystalline icebergs against a dramatic, vibrant arctic sunset. The bear is rendered in a minimalist, vector-like silhouette style, using deep charcoal black lines with negative space highlights. The background features sweeping, abstract washes of ethereal blues, magentas, and burnt oranges, suggesting the vastness of the Arctic. Focus on clean lines, extreme contrast between the dark silhouette and the vibrant background. Composition must be central and symmetrical, making the bear the dominant focal point for print use. Highly detailed, perfect print quality, digital illustration, suitable for T-shirt graphic.
negative: low resolution, blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, multiple subjects, bad anatomy, extra limbs, complex details, messy, grainy
